topics.title: Mercury
topics.description: Mercury is the closest planet to the Sun. It is small, rocky, and has extreme temperatures.
topics.audio: Text-to-speech audio is generated by the app.

topics.title: Venus
topics.description: Venus is the second planet from the Sun. It has a thick atmosphere and is the hottest planet in the solar system.
topics.audio: Text-to-speech audio is generated by the app.

topics.title: Earth
topics.description: Earth is the third planet from the Sun. It is the only known planet with life, liquid water, and a breathable atmosphere.
topics.audio: Text-to-speech audio is generated by the app.

topics.title: Mars
topics.description: Mars is known as the Red Planet. Scientists study Mars because it may have once had liquid water.
topics.audio: Text-to-speech audio is generated by the app.

topics.title: Jupiter
topics.description: Jupiter is the largest planet in the solar system. It is a gas giant with a famous storm called the Great Red Spot.
topics.audio: Text-to-speech audio is generated by the app.
